case_title: THE CITY TOW VS GAINES, ALAN

docket_entries.description: CERTIFIED MAIL TO ALAN GAINES RETURNED SIGNED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-07-1996, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-14-1996 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,100.00 FILED BY THE CITY TOW AS TO DEFENDANT GAINES, ALAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-07-1996 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C
6/13/96 AT 4:30 PM. IF THERE IS NO PROBLEM WITH THE SETTLEMENT, PARTIES DO NOT NEED TO APPEAR ON 6/14/96 AT 10:30 AM & COURT WILL DISM THE ACTION.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY TOW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GAINES, ALAN $2,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $36.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,136.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
